name: cost-estimation
description: Civil/structural cost estimation with dual-path architecture: top-down (market benchmarks, Market WBS) and bottom-up (detailed BOQ, Trade WBS) agents run independently, then converge in a comparison matrix. Seven knowledge domains (design assumptions, productivity rates, cost bases, data sources, company policy, construction methods, top-down estimation) plus cross-cutting skills (quantity takeoff, scheduling, risk assessment, audit/QA). Separate reference sheets for unit prices and productivity rates. Detailed indirect cost breakdown (manning, equipment, shop drawings, mobilization). Main quantities Pareto analysis. Multi-market support. XLSX workbooks (~24 sheets with charts/Gantt/histograms/convergence), Executive Summary and Audit Report DOCX outputs, engineering sketches.
